queries.name: TicketReader.findHeader
queries.sql: select t.id, t.summary, t.priority, t.opened_on from tickets t where t.id = ?

queries.name: TicketReader.listStatusOptions
queries.sql: select ts.code, ts.name from ticket_statuses ts

queries.name: TicketReader.searchTickets
queries.sql: select t.id, ts.name, t.priority, cu.name, te.display_name, t.opened_on from tickets t inner join customers cu on t.customer_id = cu.id left join technicians te on t.assigned_technician_id = te.id inner join ticket_statuses ts on t.status_code = ts.code where t.status_code = ? and t.priority = ? and te.region = ? and cu.name ilike ? and t.opened_on >= ? and t.opened_on <= ? and t.assigned_technician_id is not null order by t.opened_on desc, t.id asc limit ? offset ?

queries.name: TicketReader.findOpenTicketsForRegion
queries.sql: select t.id, ts.name, t.priority, cu.name, te.display_name, t.opened_on from tickets t inner join customers cu on t.customer_id = cu.id left join technicians te on t.assigned_technician_id = te.id inner join ticket_statuses ts on t.status_code = ts.code where t.status_code = ? and te.region = ? order by t.opened_on desc, t.id asc limit ? offset ?

queries.name: TicketReader.findUnassignedCriticalTickets
queries.sql: select t.id, ts.name, t.priority, cu.name, te.display_name, t.opened_on from tickets t inner join customers cu on t.customer_id = cu.id left join technicians te on t.assigned_technician_id = te.id inner join ticket_statuses ts on t.status_code = ts.code where t.status_code = ? and t.priority = ? and t.assigned_technician_id is null order by t.opened_on desc, t.id asc limit ? offset ?

queries.name: TicketReader.findDetail
queries.sql: select t.id, t.summary, ts.name, cu.name, te.display_name, te.region from tickets t inner join customers cu on t.customer_id = cu.id left join technicians te on t.assigned_technician_id = te.id inner join ticket_statuses ts on t.status_code = ts.code where t.id = ?
